intended_use: ANDI is intended for the display of medical images and other healthcare data. It includes functions for processing MR images, atlas-assisted visualization, segmentation, and volumetric quantification
intended_use_full: ANDI is intended for the display of medical images and other healthcare data. It includes functions for processing MR images, atlas-assisted visualization, segmentation, and volumetric quantification of segmentable brain structures. The output is generated for use by a system capable of reading DICOM image sets.
target_condition: Brain structure analysis; used in evaluation of neurological conditions including Multiple Sclerosis, Parkinson's disease, Alzheimer's disease, and mild cognitive impairment
ground_truth: Freesurfer v7.4.1 segmentation pre-segmentation followed by manual correction and approval by panel of 3 board-certified neuroradiologists
other_metrics: Dice coefficients for subcortical structures: 0.89-0.96 (acceptance criterion ≥0.75); Dice coefficients for cortical structures: 0.79-0.93 (acceptance criterion ≥0.8); Mean absolute volume difference for reproducibility: 2.1% (range 1.2%-3.9%; acceptance criterion <7%)
